human_actions_pending.context: 2fc2812 not yet visually confirmed. Also: forum only has Staff (private) category — create a public category to fully verify name/description/stats layout.

decisions.decision: flex (not grid) on .category-box-inner — .category-box-heading and .category-box-stat are the only 2 direct children
decisions.rationale: Grid approach assumed badge/h3/description were direct children. Three sessions of screenshots proved the real DOM has a heading wrapper and stats wrapper.

decisions.decision: .category-box-heading: flex-direction: column, with <a> as flex-row (badge | name)
decisions.rationale: Badge and name are inside the same <a> link; can't separate them into different grid columns. Flex-row on the link keeps them side-by-side.
Indents description to align with name text (48px badge + 16px gap). No DOM wrapper around name+description.
1px/0.35 was too faint to see on live Discourse. Design target shows a clear rule.

next_action: Pull phase-3-homepage-content on Discourse server → screenshot → verify badge/name/description/stats → fix selectors if needed → /gsd-plan-phase 4
context_notes: Three iterations of §6b this session. Grid approach failed twice because the assumed flat DOM was wrong. Real DOM confirmed from Image #6 (badge squished in 72px col). Flex approach on .category-box-inner is now correct. Only remaining risk: .category-box-heading class name may differ on this Discourse version — DevTools check will confirm.
